visits in the 12 months prior to screening), the AHC data system “tossed a 10 dice." If the result was 1 
to 7, the beneficiary was assigned to the intervention group; if the result was 8 to 10, the beneficiary 
was assigned to the control group. Therefore, the beneficiary had a 70% probability being assigned to 
the intervention group and a 30% probability of being assigned to the control group. About 1% of
